name: Rich Date-Nut Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter at medium speed with an electric mixer until creamy.
2. Gradually add brown sugar, beating well. Stir in egg and vanilla, beating well.
3. Add dates; let stand 5 minutes.
4. Combine flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
5. Beat butter mixture at high speed for 3 minutes, gradually adding the flour mixture, beating well.
6. Stir in semisweet chocolate morsels, chopped walnuts, and flaked coconut.
7. Drop dough by rounded tablespoonful onto lightly greased baking sheets.
8. Bake at 350°F for 10 to 12 minutes or until lightly browned.
9. Remove cookies to wire racks to cool.
Yield: 3 dozen.
